Autonomous & Independent
IP & Brand Owners.
hero.basedIn:
Based in Hong Kong.
Operating Worldwide.

entity.label: The Entity
entity.statement:
VORVN is not an agency.
It is the architecture
behind the brands.
entity.detail: VORVN is a private IP holdings company registered in Hong Kong. We own and operate brands across Southeast Asia, Northwest Africa, and Western consumer markets — kitchenware, modest fashion, food. Every brand is designed in-house, produced through our Bali studio, and shipped under our own structure. No agency clients. No licensing partners.
entity.designNote: Design · Strategy · Execution · No middlemen. No shortcuts.

portfolio.label: Portfolio
portfolio.intro: The brands and intellectual property we design, build, and own — deployed across consumer markets worldwide.

brands.name: Cook Warriors
brands.desc: A premium kitchenware brand built around the Eggscalibur — the iconic sword-handle frying pan. From concept through UAE fulfillment to US households, Cook Warriors is VORVN's flagship consumer goods brand.

brands.name: Stories of Bible
brands.desc: Incubated and co-built one of the fastest-growing Christian book brands in the US market. Led the full production side — design systems, team building, content production, and delivery infrastructure. Assembled a creative studio that produced illustrated Bible books at scale, sold primarily to the US Christian market. The brand generated over $2M in revenue across the partnership period.

brands.name: MAQTOB
brands.sector: Modest Fashion, Moroccan-Inspired, Indonesian Craft, France
brands.desc: MAQTOB is a Moroccan-inspired brand, where traditional Moroccan artistry in modest design intersects with Indonesian craftsmanship. MAQTOB.id is Moroccan-inspired, with Indonesian artisans creating luxury, limited-edition, niche pieces of art. MAQTOB.fr channels these Indonesian-crafted pieces to the Western world, starting with France, where a pre-license is already operating as a market test. Experiments in both markets are underway to validate concepts and gauge demand.

brands.name: xVoyager
brands.desc: An exploration-first brand for global nomads and adventurers. Currently in concept development within the VORVN lab — designed for those who move without a fixed address.

brands.name: Warung Marrakech
brands.desc: A concept at the intersection of Moroccan heritage and Balinese hospitality. Spice, warmth, and culture — where two continents meet on one plate.

items.title: Own the IP. Always.
items.body: No middlemen. No licensing dependency. Every brand we build, every asset we create — stays within the structure. Ownership is the non-negotiable premise.

items.title: Execute without friction.
items.body: Ideas without systems are noise. We structure, build, and deploy with operational precision — from concept to market, without compromise or delay.

items.title: Human first. AI amplified.
items.body: We got this early. AI doesn't replace the creative — it accelerates the builder. VORVN is built by humans, for humans, with intelligence as the sharpest tool.

founder.label: Founder
founder.quote:
"I believe the world belongs to those who design it, and that's exactly what we do.

We Design."
founder.name: Mehdi Ayache Berberos
founder.title: CEO & Founder — VORVN Limited
founder.caption: 20 years across design, media and entrepreneurship. Founded 6 startups. Creative Director for governments, banks and global brands. Awwwards. TEDx. European Commission. Now building VORVN — owning the work, not delivering it.

investors.label: Investors
investors.headline:
Capital meets
vertically integrated execution.
investors.body: VORVN is a privately held IP and brand holding company with in-house design, production, and distribution capabilities across Asia, Africa, and Western markets. We open two structured pathways for aligned capital — one operational, one strategic — designed to convert investment into shipped, owned, revenue-generating brands.
investors.incubatorDesc: End-to-end brand validation inside our Bali studio: design, prototyping, branding, and go-to-market testing — full-stack and fast. Built to de-risk concepts before scale.
investors.ventureDesc: We co-found ventures with capital partners on validated IP. Shared cap table, shared conviction, long horizon — structured for scale across consumer markets worldwide.

notFound.body: The route you followed doesn't map to any brand, entity, or document under VORVN. It may have moved, or it was never here.

contact.label: Contact
contact.headline:
Talk to us.
Directly.
contact.body: Investor introductions, brand collaborations, press, careers — pick a topic and write us a real message. We answer the ones that matter.
contact.privacy: We reply within 48h. No newsletters. No spam.

fields.name: Full name

fields.topicHelp: Pick the one that fits best — it routes your message to the right person.
